name: stress-testing-boilerplate
description: App-agnostic K6 stress testing framework with real-time metrics dashboard

scripts.k6:smoke:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e TEST_PHASE=smoke -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
scripts.k6:load:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e TEST_PHASE=load -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
scripts.k6:stress:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e TEST_PHASE=stress -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
scripts.k6:soak:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e TEST_PHASE=soak -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
scripts.k6:smoke:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e TEST_PHASE=smoke -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
scripts.k6:load:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e TEST_PHASE=load -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
scripts.k6:stress:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e TEST_PHASE=stress -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
scripts.k6:soak:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e TEST_PHASE=soak -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
scripts.k6:smoke:stag: docker run --rm --env-file env/stag.env -e TEST_PHASE=smoke -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
scripts.k6:smoke:prod: docker run --rm --env-file env/prod.env -e TEST_PHASE=smoke -v ${PWD}:/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/generic/main.js
